log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a PE32 executable with a size of 1054404 bytes, and it has been detected as a spreader and overlay. It is available in the CAPA and Tencent HABO sandboxes.
The sample has made 10 HTTP conversations and looked up 1 domain, but no files were dropped, and no processes or mutexes were created.
The sample made a DNS lookup for icanhazip.com and made 10 HTTP conversations, mostly to retrieve images from various IP addresses.

The sample exhibits various capabilities, including creating or opening files, accepting command line arguments, resolving functions by parsing PE exports, getting common file paths, reading files, co
The sample did not create any persistence keys in the registry.
The sample did not drop any files.
The sample created several processes, but the list of processes is empty. It also loaded various Windows modules, including kernel32 and ole32.dll.
